---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
about:
  id: hero-heading      
  template: trestles    
  image: "images/Christopher 05.jpg" 
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: contact.qmd
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/christopher-maymon
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/themaymon
    - text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=RjwGrqMAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao
    - text: OSF
      href: https://osf.io/6tvfs/
    - text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3837-7674
    - text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/christophermaymon.bsky.social
    - text: ResearchGate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Christopher-Maymon-3?ev=hdr_xprf
---

:::{#hero-heading} 
# Christopher N. Maymon, PhD

**Cognitive Psychologist | Experimentalist | Technologist**

I am a Cognitive Experimental Psychologist from Te Whanganui-a-Tara, Aotearoa | Wellington, New Zealand. 

I conduct research at the intersection of cognition and emotion. The experiments I design investigate such questions as: "Is our cognitive control (e.g., inhibition, attentional control, planning) enhanced or hindered when we experience fear?" and "Can a mind construct human-like concepts of emotions if that mind has no physical body?"

**human factors and ergonomics**, **ecologically valid experimentation**, **VR and simulation science**, and the emerging challenge of **human-AI hybrid workflow design**. I use tools like **virtual reality**, **mobile biosensors**, and **data analytics** to deliver evidence that holds up under scrutiny—not opinions.

Whether you need a usability evaluation, a controlled experiment, a VR-based training prototype, or a strategy for integrating agentic AI into your team's workflow without losing what makes human judgement irreplaceable—I provide end-to-end [consulting services](consulting.qmd): from problem framing and study design to data collection, analysis, and clear recommendations your team can implement.

[Hire Me for Consulting](contact.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg role="button"} [View Publications](publications.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg role="button"} 
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-word"></i> Download Academic CV](cv/Christopher_Maymon_Academic_CV_2026.docx){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg role="button"}

---
:::

<!-- 
    Everything ABOVE this line is inside the "Trestles" layout.
    Everything BELOW this line breaks out into the "Full Width" layout.
-->

<br>

## How I Can Help

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 🧠 Human Factors & Usability Evaluation
Are users struggling, making errors, or developing workarounds? I evaluate **human–system interaction** to identify where interfaces, procedures, and environments create friction—then I deliver actionable fixes.

Typical work includes task analysis, workflow mapping, usability testing, cognitive walkthroughs, error analysis, and evidence-based recommendations for safer and more intuitive systems.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 🥽 VR & Simulation for Human Performance
I build and use **high-fidelity VR simulations** that let teams test designs and undergo training in realistic conditions—before products are deployed at scale.

I support organisations that want to (a) establish VR capability, (b) prototype and evaluate procedures or interfaces, or (c) develop **bespoke simulations** for human factors research and performance training.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 📊 Experimental Design, Measurement & Data Analysis
If you need answers that hold up under scrutiny, I design studies that are **reproducible**, interpretable, and aligned to operational decisions. I build measurement plans, choose appropriate statistical models, and communicate results clearly to technical and non-technical stakeholders.

This is ideal for A/B tests, field trials, intervention evaluations, and any situation where you need credible evidence—not just opinions.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 🤖 Human-AI Hybrid Workflow Design
AI is transforming how teams work—but the hardest problem isn't the technology, it's designing workflows where **agentic AI systems and human judgement genuinely complement each other**.

I help laboratories and companies architect hybrid workflows that leverage the speed, scalability, and consistency of AI agents while preserving the essential role of **human intuition, creativity, and ethical reasoning** at every level of distributed teamwork. The goal is augmentation with dignity—not replacement.
:::

:::
